generated_oml:
instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure in the AECO domain represented as a Living Lab case study with unified virtual representation for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations through Building Information Modeling (BIM) as a semantic backbone."
    base:contains RoomTemperatureSensor, RoomHumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACController, ModularServiceComponents
]

instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor capturing real-time thermal data in building rooms"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RoomHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor capturing real-time moisture levels in building rooms"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor detecting presence and movement in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling lighting systems in the building"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller managing HVAC system operations via Building Control Systems"
]

instance ModularServiceComponents : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented components with standardized extension points for scalable service integration"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with semantic device metadata for actuators, sensors, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTools, ModelDrivenEngineeringTools
]

instance RoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time room temperature data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance RoomHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time room humidity data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance RoomHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationAnalytics, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, HealthEffectAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and device registry"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationAnalytics, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, HealthEffectAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for high-fidelity 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for model creation and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools for automated artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessService, SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario testing and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort adjustment using reinforcement learning based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance HealthEffectAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effect considerations"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectInsight
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment process using DSR methodology for BIM model validation, metadata extraction via Hono/Ditto Configurator, and runtime artifact generation with continuous evolution through service extensions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousEvolutionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status of building systems"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted outcomes of simulated building scenarios"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized energy consumption recommendations based on predictive analytics"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adjusted lighting and shading for optimal visual comfort"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D model visualization for facility management decisions"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Considerations for non-visual health effects such as circadian rhythm and air quality"
]

instance ContinuousEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous evolution of DT through service extensions and automated deployment"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT's analytics services, sent via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to actuators and controllers within the Building Control Systems (BCS) to adjust physical building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital twin through continuous data exchange, with no specific time intervals specified beyond live updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central DT Framework hub orchestrating BIM-based models, Hono/Ditto for bidirectional data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular services via standardized extension points for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the complete building life cycle from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, enabling life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness, with attention to semantic coherence to prevent drift between digital and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time bidirectional communication, leveraging IoT protocols for device connectivity and digital twin state synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of DT artifacts using Eclipse Hono and Ditto infrastructure, with no specific hosting environment details provided beyond the framework's modular architecture."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points enabling integration with external systems and services through modular service-oriented architecture, though specific external systems are not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for semantic representation and standardized extension points for interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]
